one_line_thesis: Alphabet Class C (GOOG): dual-engine compounder (Services + Cloud) priced for AI optionality; Lawrence base -0.28% at $356.24 on FY2025 owner cash; watch until post-capex FCF visible.

deep_dive.executive_summary:
Alphabet is a dual-engine compounder: Google Services funds AI and Cloud investment while Cloud re-accelerates (+63% Q1 2026 revenue). Q1 2026 operating margin was 36.1% (from 33.9% prior year). [Fact] GAAP diluted earnings per share $5.11 in Q1 includes large unrealized equity gains (~$37.7 billion); normalize before peer comparison.

This report values GOOG (Class C) at $356.24 (Yahoo close 2026-07-09). Base seven-year annual return is -0.28% on $5.85 per share reported FY2025 free cash flow (bear -8.4%, bull 3.7%). The segment cash-flow overlay sums discounted owner cash from Services, C...

decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: High-return compounder
applicability_tests: Owner earnings can be separated from stock compensation, working capital, and maintenance capital.
Incremental returns on retained capital are observable and durable.
The competitive advantage explains pricing, retention, share, or cost outcomes.
Terminal value is supported by a reinvestment runway rather than an unexplained multiple.
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

valuation_decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

timeline.label: Long-term debt moved -76.6% versus the prior period (46,547.0 to 10,883.0).
Basic EPS moved -28.2% versus the prior period (8.1 to 5.8).
Q1 2026 revenue $109.9B (+22% YoY); Google Cloud +63%; management cites Cloud backlog above $460B
FY2025 capex $52.5B; management guides $180–190B capex in 2026 for AI infrastructure build-out
FY2025 revenue $402.8B (+15%); consolidated operating income $129.0B; owner free cash flow ~$72.8B
Segment FY2025: Google Services OI $139.4B; Google Cloud OI $13.9B; Other Bets operating loss $7.5B
First cash dividend declared ($0.20 per share quarterly); ongoing buyback program
Alphabet restructured reporting: Google Services, Google Cloud, Other Bets, Alphabet-level activities
Sundar Pichai consolidated CEO role over Google and Alphabet; cost discipline emphasis begins
Larry Page and Sergey Brin stepped back from day-to-day; Pichai CEO of Alphabet and Google
Alphabet holding company created; Google Inc. becomes subsidiary; Class A (GOOGL) and Class C (GOOG) share structure
Class C (GOOG) shares issued via stock split; non-voting economic rights equivalent to Class A
Google IPO; dual-class structure with super-voting Class B held by founders

industry.structure: Global digital advertising and cloud infrastructure are oligopolistic: Google, Meta, Amazon, and Microsoft compete for ad budgets and enterprise AI workloads. Search and YouTube command dominant query share; Cloud is a three-way race with AWS and Azure.
industry.share_shift: Google Cloud is gaining share (+63% Q1 2026 revenue) on AI workload demand; Search revenue remains resilient (+19% Q1) but faces long-term interface risk from AI-native discovery. Hyperscaler capex arms race favors balance-sheet incumbents.
industry.trend: 2026 capex guide of $180–190B signals peak infrastructure spend; owner returns depend on Cloud backlog conversion and Search monetization through AI Overviews. EU antitrust remedies and custom silicon (TPU) are active strategic variables.

top_claims.claim: Long-term debt moved -76.6% versus the prior period (46,547.0 to 10,883.0).
Basic EPS moved -28.2% versus the prior period (8.1 to 5.8).
Leadership / governance on watch. 50 executive sales ($43,391,116) in 120d
Cash conversion (CFO/revenue) growth moved from +25.3% to +4.0% YoY in the latest quarter. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

risk_claims.claim: Basic EPS moved -28.2% versus the prior period (8.1 to 5.8).
*Primary risk: Capital spending without returns ($180 to $190 billion 2026 guide) if Cloud backlog does not convert to sustained free cash flow per share.
AI disintermediates Search (zero-click or agent browsing).
